channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: LG confirms Australian pricing and availability of radically revamped 2026 TV lineup — and there’s one big change I’m excited about the most
item.description: The raft of upgrades coming to the OLED TVs is unsurprisingly stealing headlines, but it's the updates to the QNED series that has caught my attention.
